title: MongoDB Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: MongoDB delivered strong Q4 2022 performance with $266.5 million in revenue, representing 56% year-over-year growth. The company crossed the significant milestone of $1 billion in annualized revenue run rate, achieving this five years after reaching $100 million. Atlas revenue growth reached 85% YoY, representing 58% of total revenue. Customer base grew to over 33,000 total customers, up from 24,800 year-ago. High-value customers: 164 customers with $1 million+ ARR, up 70% YoY; 1,307 customers with $100k+ ARR. Net revenue retention remained above 120%. Gross margin reached 74% non-GAAP. CEO Dev Ittycheria emphasized that MongoDB reduces the friction and cost of working with data, which is the biggest challenge developers face. The company demonstrated broad-based success across industries including financial services, retail, telecom, and healthcare. Fiscal 2023 guidance included revenue of $1.151-$1.181 billion with operating margin expected to improve. The company achieved positive operating cash flow for full year 2022, a first in company history.
